# add_date_of_birth { #cdmconnector.add_date_of_birth }

```python
add_date_of_birth(
    table,
    cdm,
    *,
    date_of_birth_name='date_of_birth',
    missing_day=1,
    missing_month=1,
    impose_day=False,
    impose_month=False,
)
```

Add date of birth from person (with optional impose day/month).

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name               | Type   | Description                                   | Default           |
|--------------------|--------|-----------------------------------------------|-------------------|
| table              | Any    | Ibis table with person_id or subject_id.      | _required_        |
| cdm                | Cdm    | CDM reference (person).                       | _required_        |
| date_of_birth_name | str    | Output column name (default "date_of_birth"). | `'date_of_birth'` |
| missing_day        | int    | Default day/month when missing (default 1).   | `1`               |
| missing_month      | int    | Default day/month when missing (default 1).   | `1`               |
| impose_day         | bool   | Force default day/month (default False).      | `False`           |
| impose_month       | bool   | Force default day/month (default False).      | `False`           |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                  | Description                      |
|--------|-----------------------|----------------------------------|
|        | ibis.expr.types.Table | Table with date_of_birth column. |
